prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约7691→8123→7233→15276→14723，2024年因新高考专业组划分出现位次大幅后移（从7233跳至15276），2025年小幅回升至14723，近两年基准约15000名附近；本省物理类计划2021–2023年均为85人，2024年86人，2025年增至89人；2026年计划94人，较2025年扩招约5.6%，竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜约第84名（2026年），近年排名在75–84间小幅波动，属于中上水平211；该校在2021–2026年声誉监测中未见明显正面或负面舆情事件；抖音热度未进入前100名榜单，关注度一般；无投档断档记录；电气工程（A）、动力工程及工程热物理（A-），其中电气工程为该校王牌学科，与当前社会高热的电气类专业高度匹配，对理科考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化专业2024年热度评级为"高热推荐"，呈持续升温趋势；电子信息/通信类亦为"高热推荐"；本省2026年高考总人数约47.49万，较2025年小幅增加，物理类考生估算约26.78万（+0.52%），竞争略加剧；学校位于北京市，一线城市区位对江西考生有一定吸引力；该校在江西招生占比约3.3%（2025年），属中等水平外省招生省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次14723、2026年扩招约5.6%、电气王牌专业高热吸引力及考生总数小幅增加等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次；预测最低位次约15189名，区间14689–15689名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间14689–15689名内，建议以二档专业（自动化、能源动力类、储能/氢能等）为主攻方向，一档电气类/计算机类可冲刺但需位次明显优于区间上限；位次在区间下限附近可重点考虑三档经管类专业保底。电气工程（A）为该校王牌，社会热度持续高涨，报考竞争激烈，建议位次优于14000名再重点冲刺。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7691 → 8123 → 7233 → 15276 → 14723. In 2024, due to the new Gaokao subject group division, the ranking dropped significantly (from 7233 to 15276), and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 14723. The baseline in recent two years is around 15000. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 85 from 2021 to 2023, 86 in 2024, and increased to 89 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 94, an increase of about 5.6% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 84th on the Soft Science main ranking (2026), with slight fluctuations between 75 and 84 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. No significant positive or negative public opinion events were detected in the reputation monitoring from 2021 to 2026. Douyin popularity did not enter the top 100 list, indicating average attention. No record of enrollment gaps. Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-) are its strengths, with Electrical Engineering being the flagship discipline, highly matching the current socially hot electrical majors, strongly attracting science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Automation major had a 'highly recommended' popularity rating in 2024, showing a continuous warming trend. Electronics/Communication majors are also 'highly recommended'. The total number of Gaokao takers in the province in 2026 is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025, with an estimated 267,800 Physics Category examinees (+0.52%), slightly intensifying competition. The university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has some appeal to Jiangxi candidates. The university's enrollment share in Jiangxi is about 3.3% (2025), making it a medium-level out-of-province enrollment province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 14723, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 5.6%, the high popularity of the flagship Electrical major, and the slight increase in total examinees, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 15189, with a range of 14689–15689.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Beijing)
- Smart Grid Information Engineering (Beijing)
- Electronic Science and Technology (Beijing)
- Computer Science and Technology (Beijing)
- Electronic Information Engineering (Beijing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation (Beijing)
- Energy and Power Engineering (Beijing)
- Artificial Intelligence (Beijing)
- Energy Storage Science and Engineering (Beijing)
- Hydrogen Energy Science and Engineering (Beijing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Accounting (Beijing)
- Finance (Beijing)
- Business Administration (Beijing)
- Supply Chain Management (Beijing)
- Engineering Management (Beijing).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 14689–15689, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Automation, Energy and Power, Energy Storage/Hydrogen, etc.) as the main direction. Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Computer) can be attempted but require a ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the range. If your ranking is near the lower limit, consider Tier 3 majors (Economics and Management) as a safety option. Electrical Engineering (A) is the university's flagship, with continuously high social popularity and fierce competition; it is recommended to aim for a ranking better than 14000 before seriously attempting it.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜约第84名（2026年），属中上水平211；该校在声誉监测中未见明显舆情事件；抖音热度一般；无投档断档记录；该校优势学科集中于电气工程（A）和动力工程（A-），均为理工科，文科专业无直接对应的A类学科支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 文科招生专业（法学、公共管理、网络与新媒体、英语等）社会热度分化：法学偏热但竞争激烈，网络与新媒体明显劝退，外语类一般观望；本省2026年历史类考生估算约20.71万（+0.51%），小幅增加；北京一线城市区位对文科考生仍有一定吸引力，但该校为理工类院校，文科专业规模和学科实力有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准2428名、2026年扩招约14.3%、文科非该校优势领域及考生总数小幅增加等因素，预计2026年历史类最低位次；预测最低位次约2656名，区间2178–3134名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1998 → 2054 → 1908 → 2339 → 2428, showing an overall backward trend. In the past 3 years, it moved from 1908 to 2428, a cumulative backward shift of about 520 places. The baseline for 2025 is about 2428. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 9 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 8 in 2024, and further reduced to 7 in 2025. The 2026 plan increases to 8 students, an expansion of about 14.3% compared to 2025, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 84th on the Soft Science main ranking (2026), placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. No significant public opinion incidents have been observed in reputation monitoring. Douyin popularity is average. No records of enrollment gaps. The university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering (A-), both in science and engineering, with no directly corresponding A-class disciplines supporting liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Public Administration, Network and New Media, English, etc.) show social popularity divergence: Law is relatively popular but highly competitive, Network and New Media is clearly discouraged, and foreign language majors are generally wait-and-see. The estimated number of history category examinees in the province for 2026 is about 207,100 (+0.51%), a slight increase. Beijing's first-tier city location still holds some appeal for liberal arts examinees, but the university is a science and engineering institution with limited liberal arts major scale and disciplinary strength.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline of 2428, the 2026 expansion of about 14.3%, the fact that liberal arts are not the university's strong area, and a slight increase in total examinees, the predicted minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 is approximately 2656, with a range of 2178–3134.
